memory.summary: I intended to finish the assignment analysis, but my friend invited me to lunch. With low energy and high stress, joining this social event seems like a reasonable priority shift.
My friend is gathering the cohort for an order, and since I already have a small energy surplus, this social event seems like a reasonable priority shift.
No matching task 'assignment_A' exists, confirming my lunch shift was unnecessary. I should return focus to academic work immediately.
I spent 2 hours on the analysis, improving progress to 0.72, but the deadline is now in under an hour with only 3.6 energy left.
I missed the analysis deadline at 18:00 with only 0.81 progress, despite working 1.5 hours. My stress is now high and energy low.
The missing task 'assignment_A' confirms the lunch shift was unnecessary, validating my earlier conclusion to return focus immediately.
The assigned reading deadline passed unfinished at 0.06 progress, confirming the analysis deadline miss. With high stress and low energy, further work on this task is unlikely to succeed.
Since 'assignment_A' has no matching task, I can finally stop working on it and rest to recover my low energy.
Letting the moment pass confirms that forcing completion now is futile. I must accept the missed deadline and prioritize recovery over further work.
Analysis progress improved slightly after a brief work session, but with high stress and low energy, further effort remains unlikely to succeed.
The absence of 'assignment_A' confirms no work remains. I can now fully stop and prioritize rest to recover energy.
The moment passing confirms that continuing to force work is futile. I will accept the missed deadline and prioritize full rest to recover energy.
